headlines.headline: Orevov Solutions recalls products in automated logistics line due to quality concerns

sentiment.reasoning: The product recall due to quality concerns will negatively impact sales, reputation, and incur costs for Orevov Solutions.

headlines.headline: Strynal Industries faces class action over wireless connectivity service disruption

sentiment.reasoning: Facing a class action lawsuit over service disruption will likely lead to legal costs, potential settlements, and reputational damage for Strynal Industries.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
